hero.name: Jobayer Hosen
hero.title: Frontend Engineer
hero.summary: Frontend Engineer specializing in building scalable dashboard, marketplace systems using React and TypeScript. Experienced in architecting production-grade applications with real-time data flows, complex role-based systems, and transactional workflows. Experienced building cross-platform applications using React-Native and Next.js. Strong focus on clean architecture, performance optimization, and AI-assisted development with production-level code quality.
